minecart.title: Build a Nether rail line connecting at least 2 Nether locations — 1 block in Nether = 8 blocks overworld

subtitle.text: 1 block in the Nether = 8 blocks in the Overworld. Build the highway here.

description: CH.06 · THE NETHER RAIL
▸ The Nether ceiling at Y=128 is the highway.
1 block of travel in the Nether
= 8 blocks in the Overworld.
A 1,000-block Nether rail = 8,000 blocks surface.
The road builders knew this.
They built the highways underground first.
◈ NETHER HIGHWAY DESIGN
└ Build at Y=122-126 (just below ceiling)
└ Full enclosure: blocks on all sides to stop Ghasts
└ Powered Rails every 32 blocks minimum
└ Minecart: basic fast travel
└ Steam 'n Rails (Ch07): adds train network on rails
faster than minecarts, carries passengers/cargo
◈ PORTAL NETWORK DESIGN
└ Link portals: build portal at exact Nether coordinates
= Nether X/8, Nether Z/8 of Overworld destination
└ Label portals with item frames + named items
└ Rail to each portal node = entire world accessible
◈ STEAM 'N RAILS PREVIEW
└ Ch07 unlocks steam-powered trains
└ Trains run on existing rail networks
└ Train + Nether highway = fastest overworld travel
└ Build the rail now, add the train in Ch07
▸ The highway is the civilization's circulatory system.
Build it before you need it.
You always need it before you know you need it.
▶ Collect 64 Rails
▶ Build a Nether rail line between 2 locations [check]
◇ Via Romana roads (Ch03 rib) gave speed on the surface.
The Nether highway gives scale.
Both together = full continental movement capability.
